title: ERCOT LMP with Adders by Settlement Point CSV download
description:
This dataset combines the real-time, five-minute LMP pricing for each settlement point with the active online adder pricing to produce a five-minute view of price data that is otherwise only available in 15-minute SPPs. 

Prior to the implementation of RTB+C on 12/5/2025, the adders added to the LMP were the Real Time Online Reserve Price Adder (RTORPA) and the Real Time Online Reliability Deployment Price Adder (RTORDPA). From 12/5/2025 on, the remaining adder is the Real-time Reliability Deployment Price Adder (RTRDPA).
